strengths: Structured ASCII-box output format for clarity
Comprehensive status collection (Git, OpenSpec, Architecture, Requirements)
Intelligent workflow recommendations based on change complexity
Clear actionable options with numbered selections
Complete Phase step references in recommendations
recommendations: Test with real multi-module projects for cross-module detection
Add edge case tests for conflicting recommendations
